---
title: "Exploratory Figures"
author: "Alonso Velasquez"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

cleaned_seaotter_data <- read_csv(here("Data/cleaned_seaotter_data.csv"))

```

### Does longer bout time equal more successful forage capture?
```{r}
cleaned_seaotter_data <- cleaned_seaotter_data %>% 
  filter(success_cd == "y" | success_cd == "n")

dive_time_summary <- cleaned_seaotter_data %>%
  group_by(success_cd) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_dive_time = mean(dive_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_dive_time = sd(dive_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    sample_size = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

print(dive_time_summary)

cleaned_seaotter_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= success_cd, y = dive_time, color = success_cd)) +
  geom_jitter(size = 1, alpha = 0.05, stroke = 1) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha= 0.88) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Successful Forage Bout", y = "Dive Time (seconds)", title = "Sea Otter Dive Time and Forage Bout Success", caption = "Unsuccessful forage bouts had an average dive time of 63.0s, while successful forage bouts had an average dive time of 72.3s") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
#T-Test!!!

#creating two different datasets
successful_dive_time <- cleaned_seaotter_data %>% 
  filter(success_cd == "y")
unsuccessful_dive_time <- cleaned_seaotter_data %>% 
  filter(success_cd == "n")

successful_dive_ttest <- t.test(x = successful_dive_time$dive_time,
                                     y = unsuccessful_dive_time$dive_time)

successful_dive_ttest
```

#has prey type changed over time?
```{r}
preytype_years_binned <- cleaned_seaotter_data %>%
  mutate(time_period = cut_interval(year, n = 4))

preytype_years_binned %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = phylum, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar() +
  facet_wrap(~time_period) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    legend.position = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Prey Phylum Catch Distributions (1993-2019)",
    subtitle = "Split into four equal time intervals",
    x = "Prey Phylum",
    y = "Number of Catches"
  )
```
